initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT AVG(member_count) AS avg_attendance
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS member_count
    FROM attendance a
    JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
    WHERE e.event_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY a.link_to_event
) AS attendance_counts;

SELECT AVG(attendance_count) AS avg_attendance
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS attendance_count
    FROM attendance a
    JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
    WHERE e.event_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY e.event_id
) AS meeting_attendances;

SELECT AVG(attendance_count) AS avg_attendance
FROM (
    SELECT e.event_id, COUNT(a.link_to_member) AS attendance_count
    FROM event e
    JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
    WHERE e.event_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY e.event_id
) AS event_attendance;

SELECT AVG(member_count) AS avg_attendance
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS member_count
    FROM attendance a
    JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
    WHERE e.event_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY a.link_to_event
) AS attendance_counts

SELECT AVG(member_count) AS avg_attendance
FROM (
    SELECT e.event_id, COUNT(a.link_to_member) AS member_count
    FROM event e
    JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
    WHERE e.event_date LIKE '2020%'
    GROUP BY e.event_id
) AS attendance_counts
